SUMMARY: Highly efficient HR Coordinator with experience in administrative environments, fast-paced and challenging. Expertise in Microsoft Office Suite, human resources audits, recruiting, and applicant tracking systems.
SKILLS: Interpersonal skills, Innovative, Microsoft Office Suite expert, Human resources audits, Maintains confidentiality, Organized, Exceptional communicator, Recruiting, Applicant Tracking System, EEO Reporting, HRMS, Best Practices, Database, Employee Performance Review
